summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The job says this is not a dedupe cluster and no shared canonical should be invented, so each PR is kept independent. No security-sensitive items were identified by the hydrated preflight summary. No close, merge, fix, or raise-PR actions are planned because merge/fix are blocked by job frontmatter and low-signal closeout is disabled.
